data.title: First Bancorp Announces Cash Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Southern Pines, North Carolina, the Board of Directors of First Bancorp (NASDAQ: FBNC) announced a cash dividend of $0.24 per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid out on April 27, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of that date.

data.title: Re Sustainability and Indian Oil Join Hands to Create India's First Integrated Used Oil Circular Economy Ecosystem
data.description: In Mumbai, India on March 13, 2026, Re Sustainability has entered into an exclusive Memorandum of Understanding with Indian Oil Corporation Limited to introduce India's inaugural organized national effort for gathering and reusing used lubricating oil. This collaboration aims to facilitate the methodical retrieval and recycling of lubricating oil, marking a significant step in promoting sustainability.

data.title: Being a data breach victim is common; don't disregard notification letters. Data incidents are widespread.
data.description: Incidents involving data breaches have grown increasingly frequent, to the point where individuals may consider discarding notification letters. Despite this trend, professionals advise against such actions.
FINLAND'S PRESIDENT STUBB: FINLAND DOES NOT NEED NUCLEAR WEAPONS AND DOES NOT INTEND TO HOST NUCLEAR WEAPONS IN PEACETIME

data.title: Beyond the Track: Sunday Swagger and Pennzoil Launch Performance-Inspired Lifestyle Collection Featuring Team Penske
data.description: A partnership has been unveiled between Sunday Swagger, a popular golf and lifestyle apparel brand, and Pennzoil, a prominent motor oil company. The collaboration will showcase Team Penske and draws inspiration from Pennzoil's rich motorsports history and association with Team Penske. The collection, named Pennzoil x Sunday Swagger, comprises 21 new products tailored for men. Known for their focus on comfort and style, Sunday Swagger aims to blend performance wear with unique personality. The alliance reflects Pennzoil's commitment to excellence both on and off the race track.

data.title: Hexcel Names James Coogan as New Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Hexcel Corporation has appointed James Coogan as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, starting on May 1, 2026. Coogan will report to Tom Gentile, the Chairman, CEO, and President of Hexcel. He takes over from Mike Lenz, who was serving as the interim CFO. Lenz will stay on as a Senior Advisor for a period to aid in the transition. Coogan's new role marks a significant development for Hexcel, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HXL.

data.title: Carvana Board of Directors Approves 5 for 1 Forward Stock Split
data.description: Carvana, a leading online car buying and selling company listed on the NYSE as CVNA, revealed in a recent announcement from Phoenix that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a 5 for 1 split of its common stock. This decision marks the first split in the company's history, aiming to make owning and purchasing full shares of Carvana stock more attainable for all team members. Mark Jenkins, a representative from the company, emphasized the significance of ensuring accessibility to their stock for employees.

data.title: How Hyperlink InfoSystem Helped a Multinational Healthcare Organization Save $10 Million by Migrating from Azure to AWS
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in New York and Los Angeles, healthcare organizations are increasingly depending on digital platforms for managing patient data, operational workflows, and cloud-based applications. The optimization of cloud infrastructure has emerged as a crucial focus in this regard. This shift comes as a response to the growing reliance on technology in the healthcare sector.
Comstock unveils new data center platform, catering to large-scale clients with advanced technology.

data.title: Backblaze Partners with StorageReview to Make Record 314 Trillion Digits of Pi Widely Available
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) has partnered with StorageReview to offer access to StorageReview’s remarkable achievement of calculating 314 trillion digits of pi. This data, amounting to over 130 terabytes, was achieved by StorageReview in December 2025. The partnership aims to cater to both dedicated and casual pi enthusiasts. The information will be accessible through the Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage service, showcasing the potential of cloud storage in the AI era.

data.title: SupplyOne Expands in New England with Acquisition of Specialty Packaging
data.description: A distributor from Connecticut is aiding SupplyOne in reaching its growth goals. SupplyOne, Inc., a distributor with corrugated converting capabilities based in Newtown Square, Pennsylvania, revealed on March 13, 2026, that it has acquired a new company. This move is part of SupplyOne's strategic expansion efforts.

data.title: HeyGears Launches New Clear Resin and Transparent 3D Printing Solution - Now Available on Amazon
data.description: HeyGears, based in Irvine, California, announced on March 13, 2026, the release of its inaugural clear 3D printing resin designed for Reflex RS & RS Turbo 3D printers. Named UltraPrint Production PAF10 Clear, this new resin is paired with their Transparent Solution platform offering detailed instructions for producing high-quality transparent 3D prints. The product launch aims to enhance the capabilities of the Reflex RS & RS Turbo printers and improve the overall 3D printing experience for users.

data.title: Sana Biotechnology Announces Continued Positive Clinical Results Through 14 Months from Type 1 Diabetes Study of Islet Cell Transplantation Without Immunosuppression
data.description: A landmark study conducted on humans for the first time has shown promising results in treating Type 1 Diabetes by transplanting insulin-producing cells without the need for immunosuppressive drugs. This breakthrough offers hope for approximately 1.6 million Americans and 42 million individuals worldwide living with Type 1 Diabetes. The study has opened new possibilities for a more effective and potentially safer treatment approach for this chronic condition.

data.title: MOVA Unveils the "Infinite Smart Universe" at AWE, Presenting the Vision of All-Scenario Smart Living
data.description: In Shanghai on March 13, 2026, esteemed premium smart technology brand MOVA, which had a successful debut at AWE the previous year, is poised to make a robust comeback with notable advancements in technology and brand development. In 2026, MOVA's showcase size has increased by six times compared to its last appearance...

data.title: Remilia Corporation Debuts Luxury Streetwear Collection, HIKKI PUNKS EXIT SOCIETY
data.description: Seoul, South Korea-based Remilia Corporation, known for its avant-garde net art, has ventured into the fashion industry with its first streetwear capsule collection named HIKKI PUNKS EXIT SOCIETY. This collection, designed at the company's Seoul studio, delves into underground online subculture through an anti-fashion perspective. The line features heavyweight cotton hoodies, distressed shirting, tartan wools, and leather and metal accessories. The pieces are adorned with spray-painted slogans.

data.title: SnoFox Sciences Becomes FieldTech and Joins Certified Industrial Partners Network, Expanding Nationwide Support for Industrial Refrigeration Operators
data.description: On March 13, 2026, SnoFox Sciences rebranded as FieldTech Systems and became a partner company of Certified Industrial Partners (CIP). This strategic move signifies FieldTech's evolution from a solo technology company to a part of a larger entity. This development marks an important step for FieldTech as it looks to expand its operations within the industry.
